description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Builders that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master and subviews branches. The workflow has two jobs: one for macOS and one for Linux. The macOS job checks out the code, sets up Homebrew, installs dependencies, configures the build, uses a compiler cache, builds the project, and uploads the result to SourceForge. The Linux job checks out the code, installs dependencies, configures the build, uses a compiler cache, builds the project as an AppImage, and uploads it to SourceForge.
